name: material-motion-studio
description: A local motion system workspace for Material-based Figma review, presets, and component demos.

interface.shortDescription: Motion patterns and Figma review workflow
interface.longDescription: Collect component examples, tune motion parameters, and document repeatable Material motion rules for design work.
defaultPrompt: Review this Figma flow and map it to Material motion patterns.
Create a reusable motion guideline for these dashboard components.
Tune the timings for this KPI drill-down and tab switch.
